creator: ahze@ahze.net
text:
On 9/4/06, Vladimir Grebenschikov <vova@fbsd.ru> wrote:
>
> ÷ ÐÎ, 04/09/2006 × 10:05 -0400, michael johnson ÐÉÛÅÔ:
> >
> >
> > On 9/4/06, Vladimir Grebenschikov <vova@fbsd.ru> wrote:
> >
> >         >Number:         102843
> >         >Category:       ports
> >         >Synopsis:
> >         graphics/gqview-devel: /libexec/ld-elf.so.1:
> /usr/local/lib/libgthread-2.0.so.0: Undefined symbol
> "pthread_getschedparam"
> >         >Confidential:   no
> >         >Severity:       serious
> >         >Priority:       medium
> >         >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >         >State:          open
> >         >Quarter:
> >         >Keywords:
> >         >Date-Required:
> >         >Class:          sw-bug
> >         >Submitter-Id:   current-users
> >         >Arrival-Date:   Mon Sep 04 10:50:22 GMT 2006
> >         >Closed-Date:
> >         >Last-Modified:
> >         >Originator:     Vladimir Grebenschikov
> >         >Release:        FreeBSD 7.0-CURRENT i386
> >         >Organization:
> >         SWsoft
> >         >Environment:
> >
> >
> >         System: FreeBSD 7.0-CURRENT #8: Sat Sep  2 01:16:05 MSD 2006
> >             root@vbook.fbsd.ru:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/VBOOK
> >
> >
> >
> >         >Description:
> >
> >
> >         same for both:
> >         graphics/gqview
> >         graphics/gqview-devel
> >
> >         % gqview
> >         GQview 2.1.1, This is a beta release.
> >         GTK Accessibility Module initialized
> >         /libexec/ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libgthread-2.0.so.0:
> >         Undefined symbol "pthread_getschedparam"
> >         %
> >
> > What version of gtk do you have installed? From ports or from
> > marcuscom ports?
>
> from ports.


Change the following line in gqview and see if it works for you

-  LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
+LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib ${PTHREAD_LIBS}"



>
> >         similar report about gvim:
> >
> >         http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=101458
> >
> >         looks like linking problem
> >
> >
> >         >How-To-Repeat:
> >
> >
> >         just run gqview build on 7-CURRENT.
> >
> >
> >         >Fix:
> >
> >
> >         No fix, only workaround:
> >         env LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libc_r.so gqview
> >
